sections.title: Yippeeee images look nice on the website
sections.description: We now have a format for adding images to the ruleset and lore! See if you can find <@790697533173268520>'s new art in the lore pages :D also the continent map has been released thanks to our friend MsAsterisk! All contributor profiles are in the About section.

sections.title: Big Project to Come!
sections.description: I'm getting distracted (like always) and have decided to make something before I move on to publishing lore: Creosmark, your one-stop spot to create and manage character sheets online! And all you have to do now is wait in anticipation >:)
